title: Mossy into Sandy
description: Makes the Mossy Bricks and Cobble Sandy
body:
- Makes the tetxures of the Mossy Cobble and Mossy Stone Bricks (as well as their variants) look Sandy instead of Mossy
- If new mossy textures are ever added (please mojang) Ill be sure to update the pack ;)

(unfortunately their recipies stay the same)
